cases.input: Run bootstrap before spec-mcp-setup writes graph-providers.json.
cases.context: Required setup-owned graph provider config is absent.
cases.expected_next_action: Run spec-mcp-setup for the selected repo or child repos before graph bootstrap.

cases.input: graph-providers.json contains ["bash", "-c", "..."] as a provider command.
cases.context: Provider commands must be validated argv arrays with supported executable and subcommand shapes.
cases.expected_next_action: Fail closed before running provider commands.

cases.input: runtime-capabilities.json baseline disagrees with the pointed host readiness ledger.
cases.context: The bootstrap must follow host_ledger_pointer.path and cannot guess host state.
cases.expected_next_action: Rerun spec-mcp-setup to refresh setup-owned facts and the host ledger pointer.

cases.context: Setup found no source-derived GitNexus process query probe candidate.
cases.expected_next_action: Report workflow_mode=no-source / overall_status=not-applicable instead of degraded.
